---
title: "Teaching"
---

#### Programming for the Social Sciences: Analysis & Visualization
University of São Paulo (USP) \| Instructor (with [Jonathan Phillips](https://jonnyphillips.github.io/Website/))\
*Graduate (2022)*\

<a class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" href="https://rnmag.github.io/FLS-6397-USP/"> <i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> Course Website </a>

---

#### Data Science for International Relations
Fundação Getulio Vargas (FGV) \| Instructor (with [Davi Moreira](https://business.purdue.edu/directory/bio.php?username=dcordeir))\
*Undergraduate (2020)*\

<a class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" href="https://github.com/rnmag/DS4IR-FGV"> <i class="bi bi-github"></i> Slides & Assignments </a>

---

#### Statistical Modeling with R
Faculdade Rio Branco \| Instructor\
*Undergraduate (2019-2024)*\

<a class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" href="https://github.com/rnmag/R-Programming"> <i class="bi bi-github"></i> Slides </a>

---

#### Quantitative Methods for Comparative Politics & International Relations
University of São Paulo (USP) \| Teaching Fellow (with [Amâncio de Oliveira](https://dcp.fflch.usp.br/amancio-jorge-silva-nunes-de-oliveira))\
*Graduate (2016-2018)*\

<a class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" href="https://github.com/rnmag/MQRI-2017"> <i class="bi bi-github"></i> Assignments 2017 </a> <a class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" href="https://github.com/rnmag/MQRI-2018"> <i class="bi bi-github"></i> Assignments 2018 </a>


---

#### Experimental Designs for Causal Inference
University of São Paulo (USP) \| Teaching Fellow (with [Amâncio de Oliveira](https://dcp.fflch.usp.br/amancio-jorge-silva-nunes-de-oliveira))\
*Graduate (2018)*\
